## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation (`apps/site` or README)
- [ ] Refactor / chore (no user-facing change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (use `pnpm -r test` for broad changes)
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes (use `pnpm -r build` for broad changes)
- [ ] Tests added or updated when behavior changed
- [ ] User docs updated in `apps/site/src/content/docs/` when needed
- [ ] `pnpm changeset` run when publishable packages changed
- [ ] AI tools: I reviewed the full diff myself (note below if AI wrote most of it)
